productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Purple Tops
description: Composition Purple cardigan made of 100% cotton knit, with three-fourth raglan sleeves that have ribbed hems, ribbed V-neck, has a ribbed hem and Big Ben logo in metallic embellishments on left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Welcome the winter in style with this purple cardigan from united colors of benetton. The knit cotton adds to it a touch of warmth, while the fabric feels soft on the skin and keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes and face the winter chill in style and comfort. Model statistics The model wears size M in cardigans Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
